title: Hello world
description: Minimal Python example: print a greeting.

title: Fetch a URL and count words
description: Fetches a webpage with urllib (stdlib) and returns the word count of its visible text.
code:
from urllib.request import urlopen
from html.parser import HTMLParser

class _Strip(HTMLParser):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(); self.parts = []
    def handle_data(self, data):
        self.parts.append(data)

body = urlopen('https://example.com', timeout=20).read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
stripper = _Strip(); stripper.feed(body)
text = ' '.join(p.strip() for p in stripper.parts if p.strip())
print(len(text.split()))

title: Send a Slack message via Composio
description: Uses the Composio Python SDK to send a Slack message to a channel. Requires Composio Slack auth pre-linked.
code:
from composio import Composio
c = Composio()
result = c.actions.execute(action='SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE', params={'channel': '#general', 'text': 'hello from microbot harness'})
print(result)
